data.title: Amazon's AI chip Trainium3 is 4x faster than Trainium2, generating multi-billion dollar revenue with over 1 million chips in production and 100,000+ companies using it. Jassy unveils successor at AWS re:Invent.
data.description: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy discussed the new generation of the company's AI chip, Trainium3, at the AWS re:Invent conference. Trainium3 is four times faster and consumes less power than its predecessor, Trainium2, competing with Nvidia. Trainium2 is already a multi-billion-dollar revenue business with over a million chips in production and 100,000 companies using it. Bedrock, Amazon's AI app development tool, allows companies to choose from various AI models. Trainium3 is projected to deliver 4.4x more compute performance, 4x greater energy efficiency, and almost 4x more memory bandwidth compared to Trainium2.

data.title: Laurentian Bank of Canada reports net income of $139.9 million, diluted earnings per share of $2.84 for 2025. CEO plans transition to specialty commercial bank.
data.description: For the three-month period ending October 31, 2025, Laurentian Bank of Canada reported a net income of $31.5 million, with diluted earnings per share of $0.66. This is a decrease from the same period in 2024, where they reported a net income of $40.7 million and diluted earnings per share of $0.88. The return on common shareholders' equity was 4.6% for the fourth quarter of 2025, down from 6.2% in the fourth quarter of 2024. For the entire year ended October 31, 2025, the bank reported a net income of $139.9 million and diluted earnings per share of $2.84, a significant improvement from the previous year's net loss of $5.5 million and diluted loss per share of $0.41. Adjusted net income for 2025 was $147.2 million, and adjusted diluted earnings per share were $3.00, compared to $168.7 million and $3.57 in 2024. The president noted the bank's transition to a specialty commercial bank and highlighted solid growth in certain sectors. These financial details were reported in Canadian dollars, following IFRS accounting standards. The bank's financial statements and analysis are available on their website and SEDAR+.

data.title: Earnings on Dec 5, 2025: MoneyHero expected loss of $0.02/share on revenue of $20.82M & Tuniu projections pending.
data.description: Before the market opens today, MoneyHero (NASDAQ: MNY) is expected to announce a quarterly loss of $0.02 per share on revenue totaling $20.82 million. Tuniu (NASDAQ: TOUR) is also expected to release their quarterly results. For more detailed information, you can refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Miami Int Holdings reported Nov 2025 trading results - technology leader in regulated financial markets; NYSE: MIAX.
data.description: In a recent press release dated December 5, 2025, Miami International Holdings, Inc. (MIAX), listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol MIAX and headquartered in Princeton, N.J., shared its trading outcomes for November 2025. MIAX is renowned for its innovative approach to developing and managing regulated financial markets spanning various asset categories. The report likely included specifics on the trading performance in the U.S. market, providing stakeholders with valuable insights into the company's operations during that month.

data.title: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. files Form 8-K with SEC on December 4, 2025. More details on sec.gov and corporate.ferguson.com.
data.description: In Newport News, Virginia, on December 4, 2025, Ferguson Enterprises Inc. submitted a Form 8-K to the SEC. This information can be accessed on the SEC's official website (sec.gov) and on the Company's Investor Relations page (corporate.ferguson.com/investor/financial-information/sec-filings). The discussions and decisions made during the 2025 annual stockholders meeting detailed in the Form 8-K are deemed routine business matters as per UK L regulations.

data.title: November saw 13 top consumer press releases, including BRACH'S candy cane opener, PetSmart's free pet photos with Santa, and Curry's brand split from Under Armour.
data.description: In a recent update from PR Newswire, several noteworthy consumer and retail developments were highlighted. These include the introduction of BRACH'S new candy cane opener, PetSmart's initiative to offer free pet photos with Santa, and Curry's decision to separate its brand from Under Armour. The announcements were made in New York on December 5, 2025. This news roundup covers a variety of topics and showcases key innovations and promotions in the retail sector.

data.title: Pan American Silver acquires 18.75 million units of Galleon Gold at C$0.60 per unit, totaling 50 million units in a private placement.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Pan American Silver Corp. has obtained ownership of 18,750,000 units of Galleon Gold Corp. securities at a price of C$0.60 per unit. This acquisition, made through a non-brokered private placement, was part of a larger transaction involving Galleon's brokered private placement and a total of 50,000,000 units. Pan American Silver Corp. is listed on both the NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbol PAAS, while Galleon Gold Corp. is listed under TSXV with the ticker symbol GGO.

data.title: Knife River Corporation receives $112M project in Texas for State Highway 6 improvements, to be completed by 2030.
data.description: BISMARCK, N.D.-- Knife River Corporation (NYSE: KNF) disclosed a recent win of a significant contract in Texas worth $112 million. Termed as the “Big 6” project, the State Highway 6 renovation initiative in Bryan/College Station commenced in the current month and is scheduled for a wrap-up by 2030. This project primarily focuses on revamping and broadening a 12-mile segment of the highway; expanding it from four to six lanes. The motive behind this development is to augment the traffic handling capacity for commuters, cargo transportation, and emergency evacuation services in the region.

data.title: Edgewater Wireless plans to extend warrants to buy 8.33M shares via TSXV application. Private placement closed in two tranches.
data.description: Edgewater Wireless Systems Inc. plans to apply to the TSX Venture Exchange to extend the expiry date of 8,330,000 outstanding share purchase warrants. These warrants were issued as part of a non-brokered private placement that closed in two tranches. The holders of these warrants are entitled to acquire common shares of the company.

data.title: ITT to acquire SPX FLOW, expanding leadership in engineered components, per definitive agreement.
data.description: Stamford, Connecticut - ITT, a prominent supplier of advanced critical components, revealed its definitive agreement to purchase SPX FLOW.

data.title: Connected car security market to reach $6.99 billion by 2032, with CAGR of 11.0%, up from $3.37 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, it was reported on December 5, 2025 that the connected car security market is expected to increase significantly, reaching a value of $6.99 billion by 2032 from $3.37 billion in 2025, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.0%. A total of 280 market data Tables and 100 Figures are included in the report, which spans across 320 Pages.

data.title: Castelion secures $350M funding to mass produce U.S. hypersonic weapons, meeting Pentagon's top priority.
data.description: Castelion, a leading defense technology company based in Torrance, California, announced on December 5, 2025, that it has secured significant funding to expedite the expansion of U.S. manufacturing capabilities. The funding will fuel the scaled production of affordable hypersonic weapons, addressing the Pentagon's top priority. This investment enables Castelion to contribute to enhancing America's conventional deterrence.

data.title: Watch Out Group secures $100M CAD funding to expand AI-Native Autonomous Micro-Factories, revolutionizing manufacturing.
data.description: A company headquartered in Montreal, Watch Out Group, unveiled a groundbreaking manufacturing approach on December 5, 2025. The company introduced an AI-native Autonomous Micro-Factory platform, revolutionizing the production of mission-critical components. In a recent development, Watch Out Group successfully concluded a financing phase, marking a significant milestone in its journey. This pioneering initiative is poised to reshape the manufacturing sector, securing substantial investments and indicating promising growth prospects.

data.title: Nov. 2025 roundup of 11 finance press releases including acquisitions, The Economist's 2026 predictions, and ADP employment data.
data.description: Summary of significant financial updates from PR Newswire, featuring numerous notable acquisitions, The Economist's forecast for 2026, and private sector job figures released by ADP. The data was announced in New York on December 5, 2025. The press releases covered various industry sectors, with a focus on mergers and acquisitions. The Economist's predictions for 2026 included analysis on global economic trends. Additionally, ADP's latest employment data offered insights into private sector job growth numbers. Overall, the news highlights the dynamic nature of the financial landscape and provides valuable insights for investors and businesses navigating the market.

data.title: Gundry MD Bio Complete 3 wins 2025 Nourish Awards for Supplements, recognized for probiotics, prebiotics, and postbiotics.
data.description: A cutting-edge gut health formula named Bio Complete 3™ has been recognized for its unique combination of probiotics, prebiotics, and postbiotics, aiding in digestion, boosting energy levels, and enhancing overall well-being. The award was given to Gundry MD® in Los Angeles on December 5, 2025, showcasing the product's effectiveness in promoting gut health. Bio Complete 3™ received a 2-Star recognition for its innovative blend, highlighting its significance in the market.

data.title: Tech news highlights from November: Citi-Swift trial, Axon acquires Carbyne, POET-QCi collaboration. NYC, Dec. 5, 2025.
data.description: In a recent report from PR Newswire, several significant tech developments were highlighted in New York on December 5, 2025. Firstly, Citi and Swift conducted a groundbreaking trial, capturing attention for its innovative approach. Additionally, Axon made waves by acquiring Carbyne to revolutionize the emergency response system, particularly 911 services. Furthermore, POET Technologies and QCi forged a partnership, signifying the importance of collaboration in the tech industry. These announcements showcase the ever-evolving landscape of technology and its impact on various sectors.
